# coolify_s3_storages (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of all Coolify S3 storage destinations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_s3_storages" "all" {}

output "storage_names" {
  value = [for s in data.coolify_s3_storages.all.storages : s.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `storages` (Attributes List) The list of S3 storages. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--storages))

<a id="nestedatt--storages"></a>
### Nested Schema for `storages`

Read-Only:

- `bucket` (String) The S3 bucket name.
- `description` (String) A description of the S3 storage.
- `endpoint` (String) The S3 endpoint URL.
- `name` (String) The name of the S3 storage.
- `region` (String) The S3 region.
- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the S3 storage.
